custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CalendarBooking.calendarBookingId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM CalendarBooking WHERE (CalendarBooking.companyId = ?) AND [$GROUP_ID$] [$CALENDAR_ID$] [$CALENDAR_RESOURCE_ID$] (CalendarBooking.parentCalendarBookingId = ?) AND ( (lower(CalendarBooking.title) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (description LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(CalendarBooking.location) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) AND ( (CalendarBooking.startTime >= ? AND CalendarBooking.endTime <= ?) OR (CalendarBooking.startTime <= ? AND CalendarBooking.endTime >= ?) OR (CalendarBooking.startTime >= ? AND CalendarBooking.startTime <= ? AND CalendarBooking.endTime >= ?) OR (CalendarBooking.startTime <= ? AND CalendarBooking.endTime >= ? AND CalendarBooking.endTime <= ?) ) [$STATUS$]

SELECT {CalendarBooking.*} FROM CalendarBooking WHERE ( (CalendarBooking.recurrence IS NOT NULL) OR (CalendarBooking.startTime >= ?) ) AND (CalendarBooking.firstReminder > 0) AND (CalendarBooking.status = 0)

SELECT {CalendarBooking.*} FROM CalendarBooking WHERE (CalendarBooking.companyId = ?) AND [$GROUP_ID$] [$CALENDAR_ID$] [$CALENDAR_RESOURCE_ID$] (CalendarBooking.parentCalendarBookingId = ?) AND ( (lower(CalendarBooking.title) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (CalendarBooking.description LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(CalendarBooking.location) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) AND ( ( (CalendarBooking.startTime >= ? AND CalendarBooking.endTime <= ?) OR (CalendarBooking.startTime <= ? AND CalendarBooking.endTime >= ?) OR (CalendarBooking.startTime >= ? AND CalendarBooking.startTime <= ? AND CalendarBooking.endTime >= ?) OR (CalendarBooking.startTime <= ? AND CalendarBooking.endTime >= ? AND CalendarBooking.endTime <= ?) ) [$RECURRENCE$] ) [$STATUS$] [$ORDER_BY$]

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Calendar.calendarId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM Calendar WHERE (companyId = ?) AND [$GROUP_ID$] [$CALENDAR_RESOURCE_ID$] ( (lower(name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (description LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

SELECT {Calendar.*} FROM Calendar WHERE (Calendar.companyId = ?) AND [$GROUP_ID$] [$CALENDAR_RESOURCE_ID$] ( (lower(Calendar.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Calendar.description LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$ORDER_BY$]

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CalendarResource.calendarResourceId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM CalendarResource WHERE (CalendarResource.companyId = ?) AND [$GROUP_ID$] [$CLASS_NAME_ID$] ( (lower(CalendarResource.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(CalendarResource.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (CalendarResource.description LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) AND (CalendarResource.active_ = ?)

SELECT {CalendarResource.*} FROM CalendarResource WHERE (CalendarResource.companyId = ?) AND [$GROUP_ID$] [$CLASS_NAME_ID$] ( (lower(CalendarResource.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(CalendarResource.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (CalendarResource.description LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) AND (CalendarResource.active_ = ?) [$ORDER_BY$]
